id.description: Unique identifier for this feature highlights component, used to match it to a screen configuration via ComponentsGenericApiModel. The value is looked up by componentId in OptimusScreenRepoImpl to retrieve the correct feature highlights data for the current screen.

items.description: List of individual feature highlight items to display. Each item consists of an icon, a title, and a subtitle. Rendered vertically in a LinearLayout (FeatureHighlightsView) by inflating a feature_highlight_item layout for each entry. If this list is null or empty, the entire feature highlights view is hidden (visibility GONE) in the fragment.

icon_url.description: URL of the icon image displayed to the left of the feature highlight item. Loaded into an ImageView via the loadImage extension. If empty, the icon is still present but no image is loaded.

subtitle.description: Text configuration for the feature highlight item subtitle, containing the display text and its color. Mapped to a TextConfig entity and rendered as a PicsartTextView with Typography.T9 and regular font weight.

color.description: Color value for the subtitle text, resolved via CascadeColorPackage.getColorOrPackageBy. Can be a color path string recognized by the CascadeColorPackage system. If the value cannot be resolved, falls back to PositiveColors.base.default.

new_field.description: A field deserialized from the API response but not currently used in any mapper or UI rendering logic.

text.description: The display text for the feature highlight subtitle. Rendered in a PicsartTextView with Typography.T9 and FontWeights.REGULAR. If empty, the subtitle view is hidden (visibility GONE).

title.description: Text configuration for the feature highlight item title, containing the display text and its color. Mapped to a TextConfig entity and rendered as a PicsartTextView with Typography.T8 and semi-bold font weight.

color.description: Color value for the title text, resolved via CascadeColorPackage.getColorOrPackageBy. Can be a color path string recognized by the CascadeColorPackage system. If the value cannot be resolved, falls back to PositiveColors.base.default.

new_field.description: A field deserialized from the API response but not currently used in any mapper or UI rendering logic.

text.description: The display text for the feature highlight title. Rendered in a PicsartTextView with Typography.T8 and FontWeights.SEMI_BOLD. If empty, the title view is hidden (visibility GONE).
